accounting.guideDepositHint: Amount in ₫ advanced to guide for tour expenses.

accountingRefund.noAbsences: No no-shows in the manifest - the refund block is not needed.
accountingRefund.howRefundsWorkTitle: How no-show refunds work (for the accountant)
accountingRefund.step1: The guide records a no-show in the manifest - then the manager works on the booking card.
accountingRefund.step2: If a refund is not due under the rules, the manager picks the no-refund option: the tourists are counted everywhere as having traveled, your review of this line is not needed - the list will show a "refund not required" mark.
accountingRefund.step3: If a refund is needed (often with cost deductions, e.g. a guideline of ~70% of the payment after ~30% withheld - the manager sets the specifics in the comment), the manager enters the amount, explains the situation and attaches a photo/certificate if needed.
accountingRefund.step4: Your job is to use the comment and attachments to make sure the refund is justified: "Approve refund" or "Reject". If rejected, the internal policy applies (a refund already paid to the client without sufficient grounds may be withheld from the responsible manager).
accountingRefund.step5: The accountant comment field is the wording for the paperwork and, if needed, something the manager can rely on when writing to the client ("the money can't be refunded because...").
accountingRefund.draftClosedHint: "Draft" and "Closed" at the bottom of the page save this block: draft - without completing the review; "Closed" - only if a decision is made for every line with a money refund.
accountingRefund.noRefundManagerNote: No refund is being arranged by the manager for this no-show. Guests are counted as having traveled. No action from you is needed to confirm a refund.
accountingRefund.waitManagerNote: Wait for the manager: they need to choose "refund not needed" on the booking card or enter a refund amount with an explanation (and a photo if needed). Until this is done, the tour review cannot be completed.
accountingRefund.mgrAckNoAmountNote: The manager marked it as processed, but the refund amount is 0 ₫. Ask the manager to fix the data (either "refund not needed" or a non-zero amount).
accountingRefund.managerCommentEmptyHint: The manager's comment is empty - if in doubt, ask for clarification before confirming the refund.
accountingRefund.noAttachmentHint: No photo or certificate attached - ask the manager if needed before confirming.
accountingRefund.refundExecutionLabel: How the refund was made (cash register / transfer)
accountingRefund.refundExecutionPlaceholder: E.g.: cash from the register, card transfer, date…
accountingRefund.traveledHint: "Traveled" numbers are for the record; by default they are booking minus no-show.
accountingRefund.accountantCommentPlaceholder: Brief and neutral; if rejecting - a clear wording for the client (required).
accountingRefund.confirmDecisionAlert: Booking "{name}": specify the accountant's decision (approve or reject the refund) before completing the review.
accountingRefund.rejectCommentAlert: Booking "{name}": if rejecting, briefly describe the reason in the comment (for correspondence with the client).

guideSettlement.pendingTopupsLabel: Top-ups held by guide (not in cash register)
guideSettlement.depositReturnLabel: Remaining deposit to return to office
guideSettlement.shopOfficeShareLabel: Office share from official shop (confirmed by accounting)
guideSettlement.shopGuideDueLabel: Guide's share from shop (payable from office)

guideSettlement.enterPayoutAmountAlert: Enter the payout amount from the cash register in ₫.
guideSettlement.amountExceedsOfficeDebtAlert: The amount cannot exceed the office's debt to the guide.

accountantSalary.guideSalaryDescription: Amount in dong (₫) - what the guide will see as the fixed payout for the tour. The calculation table below is shared across all tours: editing it anywhere applies everywhere immediately; cells can be merged horizontally.
accountantSalary.guideSalaryShownHint: Shown to the guide on this tour's card and in the income section - it's their reference figure.
accountantSalary.enterAmountDigitsAlert: Enter the amount in digits (thousand separators allowed).
accountantSalary.calcTableModalDescription: A free-form grid for your own use. This table is shared across all tours: a change anywhere is instantly available everywhere. Only the salary amount above affects the guide; they don't see this table.
accountantSalary.mergeWithNextTitle: Merge the selected cell with the one to its right

accountingDispatchExpenses.title: Expenses: driver, dispatcher, booking
accountingDispatchExpenses.subtitle: Collapsed by default. Expand to check fuel and unexpected lines, and leave a comment if needed.
accountingDispatchExpenses.addExpenseHint: Driver - to the "Driver / bus" block; dispatcher and booking - to "Booking / dispatcher". Attach a receipt photo if needed.
accountingDispatchExpenses.photoProcessFailedAlert: Couldn't process the photo - choose JPEG/PNG/WebP.
accountingDispatchExpenses.reviewedHint: The "Reviewed" status in the block header is set only after this button.
accountingDispatchExpenses.commentPlaceholder: E.g.: extra fuel approved, receipt in cash box…

managerCashModal.nothingToHandOverHint: There is nothing to hand over for this booking (debt is 0 ₫, guide top-ups don't go into the manager's handover). If needed, use the "journal only" block below.
managerCashModal.noChannelsCannotAccept: No income methods configured — add them on the Cash page, otherwise money can't be accepted.

managerCashModal.journalAutoFillHint: The money has already been collected from clients but isn't allocated to specific bookings (e.g. a booking is fully paid) — the amount is filled in automatically, check and adjust if needed.
managerCashModal.noChannelDataGoBack: No handover method data - go back to the tour step.

managerCashModal.managerCashCalcHint: Only money in the manager's cash for the booking is counted (prepayment and top-ups already marked as handed in by the guide). Top-ups still with the guide are not included here - shown separately below for each tour.
managerCashModal.noToursWithDebt: No tours with outstanding handover debt.
managerCashModal.commentAppendedToNote: Comment (will be appended to the system note)
managerCashModal.usdPartSeparateHint: If you need a dollar part — hand over that tour separately using the "Hand over" button: you can enter the $ amount manually there.
managerCashModal.handOverAllWithDebt: Hand over all tours with debt
managerCashModal.noBookingAmountAlert: {name}: this booking has no linked amount to hand over (max. 0 ₫).
managerCashModal.noIncomeChannelsHint: No income methods configured — add them on the Cash page.

managerCashModal.enterUsdOrRemove: Enter an amount in dollars or remove the dollar part.

reportIssue.intro: Thanks! You can quickly send a bug report via Telegram.
reportIssue.hint1: Mention your role (manager/guide), company name, and what went wrong.
reportIssue.hint2: Best to attach a screenshot and a short voice message.
reportIssue.note: The fix usually ships in the next update or the one after.

assignSection.title: Assign a shift
assignSection.hint: Assign an employee to a point, promo, or online for up to 14 days. The upcoming week is already visible in the schedule above — use it to fill the empty cells.

logSection.title: Assignment log & efficiency
logSection.hint: Log for the selected period: who worked where and in what mode. The mode highlight helps quickly see staff distribution, and the efficiency block shows totals for bookings and cash flow on working days.

logSection.logEmpty: The log is empty for the selected period.

coverageSection.title: Operational coverage control (14 days)
coverageSection.hint: One screen for quick duty checks: see gaps in point coverage by date, who's off, who's already assigned, and who's unassigned and needs assignment or moving to promo/online.
